- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Project: Playwright TypeScript POM BDD (Cucumber) - Framework setup complete

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Created complete project structure with:
  - Playwright + TypeScript configuration
  - Page Object Model (POM) structure
  - BDD/Cucumber feature files and step definitions
  - Utility classes and helpers

- [x] Customize the Project
  Framework includes:
  - BasePage class with common methods
  - Example Page Objects (LoginPage, HomePage)
  - Example Cucumber features and steps
  - Configuration files for Playwright and Cucumber

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
  Recommended extensions:
  - ms-playwright.playwright (for Playwright)
  - cucumber.cucumber-official (for BDD/Gherkin)

- [ ] Compile the Project
  TypeScript compilation setup with tsconfig.json
  Ready for npm install and test execution

- [ ] Create and Run Task
  Test scripts configured in package.json:
  - npm test - Run all tests
  - npm run test:headed - Run in headed mode
  - npm run test:parallel - Run tests in parallel

- [x] Launch the Project
  Project structure complete and ready for use

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md with complete documentation
  - Project structure clearly documented
  - Setup and usage instructions provided
